suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDE #232 with explicit March 26 deadline (next call). Default is rejection without additional client support from Besu, Nethermind, or Reth. Champions tasked with clarifying mempool rules and EIP-8141 txpool spec.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8037 implementation complexity and alignment with EIP-7928
suggestions.rationale: Blocking bal-devnet-3 progress. Repricing breakout scheduled March 19 to resolve gas accounting complexity, refund logic, and state gas reservoir issues. Critical for Glamsterdam timeline.
Delayed since March 5 pending EIP-8037 resolution. Most clients not ready as of ACDE #232. Test release 5.4.0 available but devnet blocked by repricing alignment issues.

suggestions.topic: Repricing breakout outcomes and next steps
suggestions.rationale: March 19 breakout scheduled to address EIP-8037/7928 alignment, mempool rule clarity, and gas accounting complexity. Results needed to unblock devnet-3 and inform Glamsterdam scope.

suggestions.topic: BAL optimization benchmarking and devnet performance
suggestions.rationale: bal-devnet-2 showing prefetch slower than expected per ACDE #232. Erigon syncing issues being fixed. Optimization performance critical for repricing decisions and April Interop events timeline.
Open since ACDE #231 with no subsequent discussion. Besu supports with naming differences noted. Low urgency but needed for cross-client consistency.
Running 1 week as of ACDE #232 with most CL clients working. Exits and builders not working yet. Informational update on ePBS testing progress.
